'''taposo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mhorr|mhorr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mhorr|mhorr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| taposo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpeseth|tæpeseth]] || [[word:tæpesej|tæpesej]] || [[word:tæpesesh|tæpesesh]] || [[word:tæpese|tæpese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapoposoth|tapoposoth]] || [[word:tapoposoj|tapoposoj]] || [[word:tapopososh|tapopososh]] || [[word:tapoposo|tapoposo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:taposoth|taposoth]] || [[word:taposoj|taposoj]] || [[word:tapososh|tapososh]] || [[word:taposo|taposo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapofsoth|tapofsoth]] || [[word:tapofsoj|tapofsoj]] || [[word:tapofsosh|tapofsosh]] || [[word:tapofsof|tapofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:taposotho|taposotho]] || [[word:taposojo|taposojo]] || [[word:tapososho|tapososho]] || [[word:taposoko|taposoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:taposoth|taposoth]] || [[word:taposoj|taposoj]] || [[word:tapososh|tapososh]] || [[word:taposo|taposo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:taposothol|taposothol]] || [[word:taposojol|taposojol]] || [[word:tapososhol|tapososhol]] || [[word:taposokol|taposokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:taposothotho|taposothotho]] || [[word:taposojojo|taposojojo]] || [[word:tapososhosho|tapososhosho]] || [[word:taposoko|taposoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:taposothon|taposothon]] || [[word:taposojon|taposojon]] || [[word:tapososhon|tapososhon]] || [[word:taposokon|taposokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:taposothoro|taposothoro]] || [[word:taposojoro|taposojoro]] || [[word:tapososhoro|tapososhoro]] || [[word:taposokoro|taposokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
